{{Quote|Any information regarding Donell's operations should immediately be brought to the attention of the Operations Ministry. Though many of our ships have been stolen, none have been since encountered, even in documented engagements with Imperial forces.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]|<ref name="WBC" />}}
'''Lon Donell''' was [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who served as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Lon Donell became an enemy of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] that warranted enough attention to be included in Cracken's dossier on criminals that should be pursued by independent operatives and bounty hunters.

==Biography==
[[File:KDYSuperTransXI.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Lon Donell's [[Super Transport XI]]]]
Lon Donell was a native of [[Prefsbelt IV/Legends|Prefsbelt IV]], [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] in [[43 BBY/Legends|43 BBY]]. A member of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], Donell served as [[Executive officer/Legends|first officer]] aboard the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''[[Detainer]]''. Around [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], Donell assumed command of the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] and became a concern for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] by using the ''Detainer'' to pull a number of New Republic and independent [[Starship/Legends|starships]] from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and capture them. Along with the ''Detainer'', Donell also commanded a converted [[Super Transport XI]] [[Container ship/Legends|container ship]], which had a cargo bay that had been modified to act as a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] hangar.<ref name="WBC" />

Donell operated out of the [[Barpine system/Legends|Barpine system]], which contained [[Barpine Shipyards|orbital shipyards]]. Once Donell had captured a ship with the ''Detainer'', it was transported aboard the container ship to the [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]]. The crews were incarcerated in a [[Barpine prison facility|prison facility]] on the planet [[Barpine]]; some of the crews were offered the chance to serve the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] with a promise of early release. Those personnel that took Donell's offer were placed among loyal Imperial crews to prevent mutiny or desertion.<ref name="WBC" />

Donell managed to acquire ten [[Transport/Legends|transports]], three [[DP20 gunship/Legends|DP20 frigates]], five [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]], a number of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], [[Scout ship/Legends|scout vessels]], and [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] over the course of several [[Standard month/Legends|months]]. The [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] believed that Donell was forming a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] to conduct a personal campaign of conquest. Most were refitted for Imperial service, while some, including starfighters and freighters, were sold to [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and Imperial-affiliated operatives. The New Republic offered a reward of 15,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for Donell's capture on charges of theft and kidnapping.<ref name="WBC" />

==Personality and traits==
Lon Donell was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who stood 1.75 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall. He was a capable commander and tactician with a speciality in [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] tactics.<ref name="WBC" />

==Skills and abilities==
Donell was trained in the use of a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], and skilled in survival techniques. He was knowledgeable about [[Star system/Legends|star systems]], and was able to [[Astrogation/Legends|plot courses]] through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Donell was capable of [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] both small starships and capital ships, along with operating their gunnery and [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] systems. He was also trained in the repair of capital ships, as well as bypassing security systems and programming and repairing [[Computer/Legends|computers]].<ref name="WBC" />

==Equipment==
Donell wore an [[Imperial officer's uniform/Legends|Imperial officer's uniform]], was armed with a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], and carried a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] and [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]].<ref name="WBC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Lon Donell was profiled in [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], a sourcebook for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' published by [[West End Games]] in [[1993]]. The illustration of Donell was provided by [[Mike Jackson]].
